arts.ttl: Szczesny confirms Barcelona move with ‘disrespectful’ comment
arts.sum: UEFA regulations mean that Barcelona are in a position to register Szczesny for the Champions League if Ter Stegen is taken out of their roster for the competition. The former Arsenal and Juventus goalkeeper is set to step up for the Blaugrana following a serious injury to No.1 Marc-Andre ter Stegen, who is set to miss the remainder of the season following patellar tendon surgery.

arts.ttl: Kounde gives his verdict on Flick and Barca after Getafe win
arts.sum: “I think overall we played a good game, we controlled things, we had chances to score more but didn’t take them. Barcelona defender Jules Kounde spoke about his team’s 1-0 win over Getafe on Wednesday after the Catalans made it seven win from seven in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Getafe's Uche slams LaLiga refs, racism from fans
arts.sum: Getafe's Nigerian midfielder Christantus Uche has criticised LaLiga referees for failing to address the harsh treatment he's received from opposition players and hit out at racist insults he said he's been subjected to from fans.

arts.ttl: Xavi's Barcelona played 'like Eibar' - Luis Enrique
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique said Xavi Hernández's Barcelona side played "long ball football like Eibar" in a new documentary which follows his first season in charge of the French champions.

arts.ttl: Man United 'offered' £84m for Barcelona star in 2020
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly made a £84m offer to sign Barcelona academy product Ansu Fati in the 2020 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘How many points?’ – Hansi Flick’s brilliant reply to journalist questioning narrow win
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick late on Wednesday provided the perfect response to a journalist questioning his side’s narrow victory over Getafe. Barca, of course, marked their return to action…

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal injury update after Barcelona’s win over Getafe
arts.sum: An update on the wellbeing of Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has come to the fore online on Wednesday evening. This comes after the youngster was spotted limping on the back…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Getafe: Highlights, man of the match, stats
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski sets a La Liga record to help Barcelona clinch a narrow 1-0 victory over winless Getafe at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Key Barcelona star spotted limping off pitch after win over Getafe
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has set alarm bells ringing late on Wednesday night. As much comes owing to developments on the back…
Barcelona kept the club’s flawless start to the new La Liga campaign alive and well on Wednesday night. As much came courtesy of a hard-fought downing of Getafe. Hansi Flick’s…
